briefdescription.para: This API, when called, initializes the XFPGA interface with default settings.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XFPGA_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function validate the Bitstream Image boot header and image header info, also copies all the required details to the ImageInfo pointer.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XST_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure
XSECURE_AUTH_NOT_ENABLED - represents image is not authenticated.

briefdescription.para: This function prepare the FPGA to receive configuration data.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XFPGA_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure
XFPGA_ERROR_PL_POWER_UP
XFPGA_ERROR_PL_ISOLATION
XPFGA_ERROR_PCAP_INIT

briefdescription.para: This function write count bytes of configuration data into the PL.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XFPGA_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure
XFPGA_ERROR_BITSTREAM_LOAD_FAIL

briefdescription.para: This Function sets FPGA into operating state after writing Configuration data.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XFPGA_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure
XFPGA_ERROR_PL_POWER_UP

: PS_PL Isolation (Non PCAP) Enable/Disable should be done before and after writing the configuring data into the PL.The relevant register to enable/disable the PS_PL Isolation is part of the XPBR domain. So those registers can be accessed only through PMU_ROM code. PMU_ROM interface is having a separate call for PS_PL Isolation Enable and we are handlings this logic as part XFpga_PreConfigPcap() API. But to Disable the isolation PMU_ROM interface doesn't have any separate call. The PS_PL isolation disable logic is part of the Power_up sequence. So to disable the PS_PL Isolation we should call PL Power_up again in the Post_config sequence.

briefdescription.para: Performs the necessary initialization of PCAP interface.

parameterdescription.para: Provides information about Crypto operation needs to be performed on the given Image (or) Data.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XFPGA_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: Waits for PCAP transfer to complete.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XFPGA_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: Number of bytes that the DMA should write to the PCAP interface

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XFPGA_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function is used to Validate the user provided crypto flags with Image crypto flags.

parameterdescription.para: Provides the information about Crypto operation needs to be performed on the given Image (or) Data.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XFPGA_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function waits for PL Done bit to be set or till timeout and resets PCAP after this.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XFPGA_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function is used to power-up the PL.

simplesect.para:
Returns Status
XFPGA_SUCCESS on success
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function is used to request isolation restore, through PMU.
This function is used to start reset of the PL from PS EMIO pins.
This function is used to release reset of the PL from PS EMIO pins.
Provides the STATUS of PCAP interface.
This function is responsible for identifying the Bitstream Endianness, and set the required csudma configurations before transfer the data into the PL.

parameterdescription.para: Size of the Bitstream Image(Number of bytes).
